$comment: Constraints spec TEMPLATE. Copy to constraints.json and pin it. This is the INPUT to Agent 6 (Compliance) — the domain/legal/correctness rules a working+pretty page can still violate. Without this, the pipeline rebuilds pages that look right and run clean but are non-compliant. Add the rules that matter for the target's vertical.

rules.description: Any lead-capture form collecting a phone number must show prior-express-written-consent language: names the contacting party, discloses autodialer + prerecorded/artificial-voice calls and SMS, states consent is not a condition of purchase, includes message frequency + STOP/HELP.
No fabricated reviews, ratings, testimonials, or statistics. Marketing claims must be substantiable.
Forms collecting personal data must link a privacy policy and disclose how data is used/shared.
